format_issues.detail: File paths use Windows-style backslashes (\) instead of forward slashes (/), which may affect cross-platform readability.

review_suggestions.hint: Replace all backslashes in file paths (e.g., repos\xv6-k210\...) with forward slashes for standard compliance.
In the Cargo.toml section, explicitly display the [dependencies] table content (even if empty) to definitively prove absence of network crates, rather than only showing workspace members.
